attr.title: TinyTube
attr.desc: Lightweight gamepad-driven YouTube frontend. Search, local subscriptions and watch history, with playback via mpv (software decode, quality capped for H700-class devices). Requires wifi.
attr.inst: Requires an internet connection. Playback needs mpv: either the muOS system mpv, or drop a static aarch64 mpv build into tinytube/bin/. See README.
